      "content": "# How to get reasoning summary using GPT-5-mini in Agent SDK. When using GPT-5-mini via the **Response** API, it’s easy to get reasoning summary text from the returned response object. I can’t find any way to get the reasoning summary when using the same model in the **agent** SDK. I’ve run a variety of cases that give responses that are good and must require reasoning effort with results always as described. model_settings= ModelSettings(reasoning=Reasoning(effort=\"low\", summary=\"detailed\")),. if o.type=='reasoning' and o.summary:.
